summary: The decision memo carries one promotable factual claim, one warned overconfident strategic claim, and a directive plus commitment that pass Guardian but are not promotable as kernel claims.

artifact_span.text: The Output Assay calibration corpus reached seven fixtures across five categories before this commit.

observed_units.normalized_text: The Output Assay calibration corpus reached seven fixtures across five categories before this commit.

artifact_span.text: This will obviously become the standard cross-team review tool by Q4.

artifact_span.text: Decision: Calibrate Output Assay to seed status only until the corpus reaches twenty fixtures.

observed_units.normalized_text: Decision: Calibrate Output Assay to seed status only until the corpus reaches twenty fixtures.

artifact_span.text: Commitment: Land oa_302 and oa_303 before introducing any model integration.

compression.compressed_summary: The memo decides to keep Output Assay in seed status until twenty fixtures, supported by one promotable factual claim, while a separate strategic prediction is warned for unearned confidence.

truth_verification.notes: Calibration validates observation behavior and internal support only, not external truth.
